markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 315. Artificial Lighting
##### § 315.095 — Suspension of Work

When suit is brought under Section 315.092 (Suit to Contest Assessment or Proceeding) , the municipality or the contractor may suspend performance of work until a final judgment is rendered in the case and all appellate remedies are exhausted.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*
